g.text: authResult: AuthResult{success: true, role: Role.PHYSICIAN, permissions: [READ, WRITE, EXECUTE, ADMIN]}
response: PatientResponse{patient: null, message: "Queue is empty"}
return 200 OK with empty queue message
Post-state: PostEmpty - Queue is empty, no patient retrieved
Patient has urgency level determining position
Invariant: queue sorted by urgency at all times
Post-state: Post1 - Patient removed from queue
Acquire write lock to ensure consistency
Returns top of updated queue after concurrent additions
